title: Implement user authentication for Relay demo
objective: Add JWT-based authentication to the Relay WhatsApp demo application
scope: Implement /login and /register endpoints, JWT token generation and validation, middleware for protected routes
out of scope: OAuth providers, password reset, rate limiting, frontend UI changes
acceptance criteria: All auth endpoints return proper 200/401/403 responses; protected routes reject unauthenticated requests; tests pass
stop conditions: Secret management requires external service; scope expands to SSO; tests cannot be run
approval boundaries: No spending; no publishing; no destructive DB migrations
constraints: Use existing Go module for JWT; follow existing project conventions
expected output: Working auth endpoints with tests and documentation
